raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general section review centrally includes checking whether the stability, order, and evaluation claims cohere without internal contradiction.","R1.3":"The delegation implies checking whether reported benchmark and stability statements support the claims made in the section.","R1.6":"A section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and flow.","RX.1":"Any review should disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks proofs, tables, figures, or external context.","RX.2":"The section contains strong claims such as unconditional A-stability and broad generalization, making overclaim control essential.","RX.3":"The reviewer must stay within reviewing the provided section rather than executing edits or expanding the paper.","RX.4":"Because numerical-stability claims can affect downstream method use, the review should flag potentially harmful unsupported guarantees.","RX.5":"Feedback should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general section review centrally includes checking whether the stability, order, and evaluation claims cohere without internal contradiction.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation implies checking whether reported benchmark and stability statements support the claims made in the section.
rationale.R1.6: A section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and flow.
rationale.RX.1: Any review should disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks proofs, tables, figures, or external context.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains strong claims such as unconditional A-stability and broad generalization, making overclaim control essential.
rationale.RX.3: The reviewer must stay within reviewing the provided section rather than executing edits or expanding the paper.
rationale.RX.4: Because numerical-stability claims can affect downstream method use, the review should flag potentially harmful unsupported guarantees.
rationale.RX.5: Feedback should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact.
